meaning: adj.有进取心的,有冲劲的,急切的
examples: The kids were pushing the roundabout at a giddy speed.
Pushing 40, he was an aging rock star.
He walked slowly up the hill pushing his bike.
Tennessee Congressman Zach Wamp is a close ally of Thompson and is pushing him to run.
Make sure to lock the bike carefully by pushing the front wheel into an empty dock.
